flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at MTI College rose 35% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.2k → $8.4k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at MTI College fell 29% between 2007 and 2010 (73.7% → 52.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at MTI College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
